title: Photometry: Magnitude Schema
description: Magnitude-based UV/optical/NIR photometry for an astronomical source in a specified filter, consistent with optical survey reporting practices.

filter.description: Filter used for the observation (e.g., u, g, r, or instrument-specific).

mag.description: Measured apparent magnitude [mag] of the source in the specified filter.

mag_system.description: Photometric magnitude system (zeropoint convention) for mag and limiting_mag. Default is 'AB'.

limiting_mag.description: Limiting magnitude (upper limit) for the observation [mag] in the specified filter.

limiting_mag_sigma.description: Significance level [sigma] associated with limiting_mag. Default is 5 (5-sigma upper limit).
